use std::alloc::{GlobalAlloc, Layout};
use std::ptr;

// Mocking CUDA runtime calls for the Rust build
extern "C" {
    fn cudaHostAlloc(ptr: *mut *mut std::ffi::c_void, size: usize, flags: u32) -> i32;
    fn cudaFreeHost(ptr: *mut std::ffi::c_void) -> i32;
}

pub struct UnifiedAllocator;

impl UnifiedAllocator {
    pub const fn new() -> Self { Self }
}

unsafe impl GlobalAlloc for UnifiedAllocator {
    unsafe fn alloc(&self, layout: Layout) -> *mut u8 {
        let mut ptr: *mut std::ffi::c_void = ptr::null_mut();
        // Flags: Portable | Mapped
        if cudaHostAlloc(&mut ptr, layout.size(), 6) == 0 {
            ptr as *mut u8
        } else {
            std::alloc::System.alloc(layout)
        }
    }

    unsafe fn dealloc(&self, ptr: *mut u8, layout: Layout) {
        if cudaFreeHost(ptr as *mut std::ffi::c_void) != 0 {
            std::alloc::System.dealloc(ptr, layout);
        }
    }
}
